2026-04-22T22:48:50.8249505Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8250060Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8250495Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8250863Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8251360Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8251596Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8251758Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8251939Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8252109Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8252337Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8252541Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8252826Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-22T22:48:50.8253079Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42).
